    meta:

        description = "Detection for Advanced Flow will make Android sideloading safer"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-23"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31851 - Lack of rate limiting allows brute-force at"; content:"CVE-2026-31851"; nocase; sid:3706516; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31381, CVE-2026-31382: Gainsight Assist Information"; content:"CVE-2026-31381"; nocase; sid:5075791; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Breaking the Sound Barrier, Part II: Exploiting CVE-2024-545"; content:"CVE-2024-54529"; nocase; sid:9923020; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
